disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe cramping lower pelvic pain that began about an hour ago while lifting a heavy box, in a patient with a hormonal IUD placed ~2 years ago
trigger_question_examples: When did the pain start and what were you doing?
Do you have an IUD or any contraceptive device?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about an hour ago all of a sudden when I lifted a heavy box. I've had a hormonal IUD for about two years and the cramping is really intense.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient can palpate a hard object sitting low near the vaginal opening — the device feels displaced downward from its usual position
trigger_question_examples: Can you feel anything unusual when you check with your fingers?
Does it feel like the device has moved?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I can feel the hard plastic sitting really low, close to the opening. It's never felt like that before; normally I can only just feel the threads.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No heavy vaginal bleeding, no fever noticed, no foul-smelling discharge (patient-reported pertinent negatives)
trigger_question_examples: Are you bleeding heavily or soaking through pads?
Any fever, chills, or bad-smelling discharge?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not bleeding heavily, I don't think I have a fever, and there's no smelly discharge — it's really just the pain and feeling the device low down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ibuprofen 400mg taken 30 minutes ago gave no relief; pain remains severe and constant
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any pain relief, and did it help?
What have you tried so far?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took a 400mg ibuprofen about half an hour ago and it hasn't touched it at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Possibility of pregnancy — the patient has not done a pregnancy test and cannot be sure; last sexual activity and cycle timing uncertain
trigger_question_examples: Is there any chance you could be pregnant?
Have you done a pregnancy test?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't done a test — I assumed the IUD was covering me, so I hadn't thought about it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient lives alone and is in high acute distress, worried about coping overnight by herself
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you right now?
Do you have support at home tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own and I'm really scared to be alone with this pain tonight.
